title: sambucus racemosa var. flavescens
intro: Sambucus racemosa var. flavescens, also known as yellow elder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to North America. It is a variety of the elderberry plant, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as colds and flu. The plant's flowers and berries have anti-inflammatory and antiviral properties, offering health benefits such as reducing fever and relieving coughs. Herbal preparations of Sambucus racemosa var. flavescens include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to boost the immune system and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections.
